items.raw_excerpt: The retail conglomerate Shinsegae, which operates Starbucks Korea, had previously identified a series of negligent acts leading up to the promotion, including officials signing off without checking the design file.
items.summary_en: South Korean police have questioned a Starbucks Korea executive about a promotion called Tank Day. The event caused public anger for appearing to glorify war. Shinsegae, which runs Starbucks Korea, admitted staff failed to check the design before approving it.
items.summary_ko: 한국 경찰이 '탱크 데이' 프로모션과 관련해 스타벅스 관계자를 조사했다. 이 행사는 전쟁을 미화한다는 논란을 일으켰다. 스타벅스코리아를 운영하는 신세계는 디자인을 확인하지 않고 승인한 직원들의 과실을 인정했다.
items.title_en: South Korea police question Starbucks executive over Tank Day event
items.title_ko: 한국 경찰, 스타벅스 '탱크 데이' 사건 관계자 조사
items.title_original: South Korean police quiz executive in Starbucks 'Tank Day' fiasco

items.raw_excerpt: A large school of fish swarms near the surface of the water beneath an angler's fishing line at Saikazaki harbor in Wakayama City, Wakayama Prefecture. The coastal waters surrounding the port are known for a rich marine ecosystem that supports both local recreational angling and a thriving commercial fisheries industry,…
items.summary_en: A large school of fish gathered near the water surface at Saikazaki harbor in Wakayama City. The port area is known for rich sea life that supports local anglers and commercial fishing.
items.summary_ko: 와카야마시 사이카자키항에서 큰 물고기 떼가 수면 가까이 모였습니다. 이 항구 주변 바다는 해양 생태계가 풍부해 낚시객과 상업 어업을 함께 뒷받침합니다.
items.title_en: Fish Swarm at Saikazaki Harbor
items.title_ko: 사이카자키항에 몰린 물고기 떼
items.title_original: Swarm of fish

items.raw_excerpt: A field near Holthone in Overijssel has turned into a military camp this week, with rows of tents and camp beds. The people sleeping in them are not soldiers, though, but archaeologists and military veterans – and they are there to dig up a battle fought 800 years ago. They are carrying out the first scientific study of the Battle of Ane, a bloody clash in 1227 between the bishop of Utrecht’s army and farmers from Drenthe, NOS reported from...
items.summary_en: A field in Overijssel has become a camp for archaeologists and veterans digging up the Battle of Ane from 1227. It is the first scientific study of this medieval clash between the bishop's army and local farmers. The site is near the village of Holthone.
items.summary_ko: 오버레이설의 홀토네 인근 들판이 고고학자와 참전용사들의 발굴 캠프로 변했다. 이들은 1227년 위트레흐트 주교 군대와 드렌테 농민군 간 격전이었던 '아너 전투'에 대한 첫 과학적 조사를 진행 중이다.
items.title_en: Archaeologists and veterans dig up medieval battlefield
items.title_ko: 네덜란드 들판, 800년 전 중세 전장 발굴 현장으로 변하다
items.title_original: The first dig at a Dutch medieval battlefield, 800 years on

items.raw_excerpt: Wie der einstige Investor des Kulturhauses Kosmos seinen Mikrokosmos gefunden hat.
items.summary_en: Ruedi Gerber from Zurich once backed the Kosmos culture house. Now he has found a new small world in Tatti, a village in Tuscany, and is making a film about rural flight.
items.summary_ko: 취리히의 루디 게르버는 한때 문화공간 코스모스의 주요 투자자였다. 그는 이제 토스카나의 작은 마을 타티에서 새로운 삶의 무대를 찾고, 지방 소멸을 다룬 영화를 만들고 있다.
items.title_en: Zurich film man falls for a Tuscan village
items.title_ko: 취리히의 영화인이 사랑한 토스카나 마을
items.title_original: Ein Film gegen die Landflucht – der Zürcher Ruedi Gerber verliebt sich ins Dorf Tatti - Neue Zürcher Zeitung

items.raw_excerpt: 金沢の地元食材を使ったグルメフェア「金沢産食材フェア ～ Kanazawa Story ディナー」が11月19日、「ハイアット セントリック 金沢」（金沢市広岡1）で始まる。
items.summary_en: A gourmet fair using local Kanazawa ingredients will start on November 19 at Hyatt Centric Kanazawa. The limited dinner features many kinds of local foods.

items.summary_en: The Antwerp Chamber named Jan Reeb as its 2026 Gem of the Year. The award appears to be a small local honor in the Northwest Ohio community.

items.raw_excerpt: The Local spoke to Eva Lenneman, a curator at Stockholm's Museum of Spirits in Stockholm about the history of snaps in Sweden.
items.summary_en: A museum curator explains why Swedes drink snaps at Midsummer. The tradition is closely tied to Swedish history and celebration culture.
items.summary_ko: 스웨덴 한여름 축제에서 빠질 수 없는 술 스냅스의 역사를 박물관 큐레이터가 설명한다. 이 전통은 스웨덴의 축제 문화와 깊이 연결되어 있다.
items.title_en: How snaps became a Swedish Midsummer tradition

items.raw_excerpt: In diesem riesigen LEGO-Eigenbau stecken unter anderem ein ganzes Dorf, eine Zwergenstadt und eine versteckte Gedankenschinder-Kolonie.
items.summary_en: A LEGO enthusiast built a massive 8-meter-long Dungeons & Dragons model. It includes a whole village, a dwarf city, and a hidden mind-flayer colony. The builder says it would be worth clearing out a couch to make room for it.
items.summary_ko: 한 LEGO 매니아가 8미터 길이의 거대한 던전앤드래곤 모형을 제작했다. 마을 전체, 드워프 도시, 그리고 숨겨진 사상억제자 식민지가 포함되어 있다. 제작자는 소파를 치울 가치가 있다고 말했다.
items.title_en: LEGO fan builds gigantic 8-meter Dungeons & Dragons set
items.title_ko: LEGO 매니아, 8m 길이의 거대한 던전앤드래곤 세트 제작
items.title_original: LEGO-Tüftler bauen gigantisches, 8 Meter langes Dungeons & Dragons-Set - und ich würde sofort meine Couch rausschmeißen, um Platz dafür zu haben - GamePro

items.raw_excerpt: Tough action is needed to stop the spread of raccoons, which threaten to become a serious problem nationwide, officials in Limburg say. The province is currently home to an estimated 100 to 200 raccoons and some 400 have been killed since 2019. Officials say that although their number is not increasing quickly at the moment, this will change if more efforts are not made to eradicate them from the region. The province has a budget of €750,000 up to 2030...
items.summary_en: Officials in Limburg say around 100 to 200 raccoons live in the province and the number could grow fast without action. About 400 raccoons have been killed since 2019. The province has set aside €750,000 to fight the problem through 2030.
items.summary_ko: 림뷔르흐 주 당국은 약 100~200마리의 너구리가 서식 중이며, 조치를 취하지 않으면 개체 수가 빠르게 늘어날 수 있다고 경고했다. 2019년 이후 약 400마리가 포획됐다. 주 정부는 2030년까지 75만 유로의 예산을 편성했다.
items.title_en: Limburg province acts to stop raccoon invasion
items.title_ko: 림뷔르흐 주, 너구리 확산 막기 위해 나서다
items.title_original: Action needed to combat raccoon plague, Limburg province says

items.raw_excerpt: Albalat dels Sorells vivirá el próximo 27 de junio una de las propuestas de ocio juvenil más singulares del año. La Concejalía de Juventud del Ayuntamiento, en colaboración con WRG World Real G...
items.summary_en: Albalat dels Sorells will host a special youth event on June 27. The town plans a six-hour zombie survival night, organized by the local youth office with WRG World Real G.
items.summary_ko: 알발라트 델스 소렐스가 6월 27일 특별한 청소년 행사를 연다. 지역 청소년 부서가 WRG World Real G와 함께 여섯 시간 동안 이어지는 좀비 생존의 밤을 준비했다.
items.title_en: Zombies Will Visit a Valencia Village
items.title_ko: 발렌시아의 한 마을에 좀비가 온다
items.title_original: Los zombies invadirán un pueblo de Valencia: seis horas de supervivencia en una noche inaudita - elperiodic.com

items.raw_excerpt: Los piropos a Córdoba surgen desde la primera pregunta a Daniela Zyman, directora artística de Thyssen-Bornemisza Art Contemporary (TBA21) y comisaria de Futuros abundantes , la primera de las exposiciones que albergará el C3A fruto de la colaboración de esta fundación con el Ayuntamiento de la ciudad y la Junta de Andalucía. Durante los próximos tres
items.summary_en: Daniela Zyman, artistic director of Thyssen-Bornemisza Art Contemporary, says the help of Córdoba's artistic collectives has been invaluable for TBA21. She spoke ahead of Futuros abundantes, the first exhibition held at C3A under a collaboration with the city and the Andalusian government.
items.summary_ko: 티센-보르네미차 아트 컨템포러리(TBA21)의 다니엘라 자이만 예술 감독이 코르도바 예술 단체들의 도움이 매우 귀중했다고 밝혔다. 그녀는 코르도바 시청 및 안달루시아 정부와의 협력으로 C3A에서 열리는 첫 전시회 'Futuros abundantes'를 앞두고 이 같은 말을 전했다.
items.title_en: Artistic director praises Córdoba artist groups for help with new exhibition
items.title_ko: TBA21 예술 감독, 코르도바 예술 단체들의 도움에 감사 인사
items.title_original: «La ayuda de los colectivos artísticos de Córdoba ha sido inestimable para TBA21» - Diario Córdoba

items.raw_excerpt: En plena ruta hacia la Región de Murcia, Miguel Ángel Revilla decidió abandonar la autovía para darse un homenaje muy concreto: un plato de paella en un discreto restaurante de un pueblo de Valencia. El expresidente cántabro convirtió esa parada en una declaración pública sobre cuál es, para él, la auténtica paella valenciana, un plato ... Leer más
items.summary_en: Miguel Angel Revilla left the highway on his way to Murcia to eat paella at a quiet restaurant in a small village in Valencia. The former Cantabrian president used the stop to say what he thinks real Valencian paella should be.
items.summary_ko: 미겔 앙헬 레비야는 무르시아로 가던 길에 고속도로를 벗어나 발렌시아의 작은 마을에 있는 조용한 식당에서 파에야를 먹었다. 전 칸타브리아 주지사인 그는 이 방문을 계기로 자신이 생각하는 진짜 발렌시아식 파에야가 무엇인지 공개적으로 말했다.
items.title_en: A Small Valencia Village Paella Wins Over Miguel Angel Revilla
items.title_ko: 발렌시아 작은 마을의 파에야, 미겔 앙헬 레비야를 사로잡다
items.title_original: La paella del restaurante de un pequeño pueblo de Valencia que ha cautivado a Miguel Ángel Revilla - Noticias del Vino

items.raw_excerpt: The inaugural Lake Pepin Pride is coming to the Village of Stockholm June 11-13.
items.summary_en: The Village of Stockholm in western Wisconsin will host the first Lake Pepin Pride festival from June 11 to 13. The event brings a Pride celebration to a small community near Lake Pepin.

items.raw_excerpt: Villages, towns and cities across France will come alive with the sound of music on Sunday, June 21st, to celebrate the sheer joy of live performances in bars, cafés, venues and on the street.
items.summary_en: Villages, towns, and cities across France will fill with live music on Sunday, June 21. People will hear performances in bars, cafes, venues, and on the street.
items.summary_ko: 6월 21일 일요일, 프랑스 전역의 마을과 도시가 라이브 음악으로 채워진다. 사람들은 술집, 카페, 공연장, 거리에서 열리는 공연을 즐길 수 있다.

items.raw_excerpt: Monte Bibele: esclusione di UniBo dalla gestione contestata dall’archeologo Vitali L’archeologo Daniele Vitali esprime forte preoccupazione per la decisione amministrativa che ha portato alla fine del...
items.summary_en: Archaeologist Daniele Vitali is worried about an administrative decision at Monte Bibele. The change ended the University of Bologna's role in managing the archaeological site.

items.raw_excerpt: Burghausen – die malerische Kleinstadt mit 20.000 Einwohnern liegt etwa auf halber Strecke zwischen Salzburg und Passau, am Ufer der Salzach. „Unterwegs beim Nachbarn“ macht einen Streifzug durch die Geschichte der Stadt und ihre Gegenwart – am Samstag, dem 14. September um 16.30 Uhr in ORF 2.
items.summary_en: Burghausen, a picturesque town of 20,000 residents between Salzburg and Passau, is the subject of a new TV documentary. The show airs on ORF 2 on September 14 and explores the town's history and daily life.
items.summary_ko: 잘츠부르크와 파사우 사이에 위치한 인구 2만의 그림 같은 소도시 부르크하우젠이 TV 다큐멘터리로 조명된다. 9월 14일 ORF 2에서 방영되는 이 프로그램은 도시의 역사와 현재를 탐험한다.
items.title_en: TV Show Explores Small Town Burghausen and Its History

items.raw_excerpt: Trader Joe's Pound Plus chocolate bars are an iconic staple of the grocery store chain -- but where exactly do these gargantuan sweets come from?
items.summary_en: Trader Joe's giant Pound Plus chocolate bars are a fan favorite, but the company does not make them itself. Rumors suggest a well-known high-end chocolate company is the real manufacturer.

items.raw_excerpt: An historic Dutch village with just 100 residents is set to start charging visitors an entry fee in an effort to bring down overtourism and raise
items.summary_en: Zaanse Schans, a historic Dutch village with only 100 residents, will charge visitors an entry fee starting in 2026. The tiny village hopes to reduce overtourism with this measure.
items.summary_ko: 자안스스칸스는 주민이 100명뿐인 네덜란드의 역사적인 풍차 마을로, 2026년부터 방문객에게 입장료를 부과할 예정이다. 이 작은 마을은 이 조치로 과잉 관광을 줄이길 기대하고 있다.
items.title_en: Dutch windmill village of 100 residents to charge tourist tax in 2026

items.raw_excerpt: NEW TECUMSETH, ONT. — Far from the FIFA World Cup hubbub that has gripped Toronto to the south, there is also plenty of soccer spirit to be found in a small town about a 90-minute drive from the Ontario capital. A Panama team logo can be seen on a larg...
items.summary_en: Panama has found a World Cup sanctuary in New Tecumseth, a small town in Ontario. The town is far from the World Cup noise in Toronto, but its soccer spirit is strong.
items.summary_ko: 파나마 대표팀은 온타리오의 작은 마을 뉴테컴세스에서 월드컵의 쉼터를 찾았다. 토론토의 월드컵 열기와는 떨어진 곳이지만, 이 마을에도 축구 응원 분위기가 가득하다.
items.title_en: Panama Finds Soccer Spirit in a Small Ontario Town

items.raw_excerpt: Vermont is one of America's greenest states. Of course, that draws visitors, but there are still many crowd-free small towns to find this summer.
items.summary_en: Vermont is known as one of the greenest states in the United States. The article says visitors can still find small towns with fewer crowds this summer.
